notes: Pulled by scripts/pull_fam.py. fam.state.gov is JS-rendered and serves an incomplete TLS cert chain that a TLS-inspecting egress proxy can't verify (HTTP 503) — an egress/cert-chain issue, not bot-gating, so curl_cffi does not help. The puller writes pointer stubs when blocked and verbatim text when the egress can complete the chain. The _file_is_stub guard preserves any committed verbatim content.
